overview: A premium admin panel UI inspired by luxury furniture and interior design. Features 7 management sections (Dashboard, Inquiries, Categories, Products, Gallery, Reviews, Settings) with a live theme customization system using beige/cream/gold aesthetics, serif headings, and smooth animations.
features: Luxury beige/cream/gold design aesthetic with serif headings
7-section admin navigation: Dashboard, Inquiries, Categories, Products, Gallery, Reviews, Settings
Dashboard with stat cards, Recharts chart, and recent inquiries table
Inquiries management with View modal, Email & WhatsApp reply links
Categories, Products, Gallery, Reviews CRUD with modal forms
Floating theme customization panel with color pickers, dark/light mode, font toggle, density, and border radius controls
CSS variable-based live theme that persists in localStorage
Reusable component system: Button, Card, Table, Modal, Form, Sidebar, Toast
Smooth animations, hover effects, and toast notifications throughout
